news.t: Touchstone Investments Launches Four Distinctively Active Managed ETFs

holdings.infoBox: LCF is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 8.61%, Microsoft at 8.32%, Apple at 7.32%, NVIDIA at 7.03%, and Meta Platforms at 5.99%.

overview.description: The Touchstone US Large Cap Focused ETF (LCF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is a concentrated portfolio of US-listed large-cap stocks selected based on high conviction that the businesses have a sustainable competitive advantage or have a high barrier to entry in place.   LCF was launched on Jul 27, 2022 and is issued by Touchstone.

data.title: Touchstone Investments Launches Four Distinctively Active Managed ETFs
data.text: Expansion into ETFs provides the potential for a more tax-efficient, cost competitive and transparent way to access Touchstone's investment strategies CINCINNATI , July 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Touchs...
